---
title : "Figure 6.4"
subtitle : "Nadaraya-Watson in one dimension"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
target_fun(x) = 0.5 .- abs.(x .- 0.5)

function generate_data(rng; n=100, std_noise=0.1)
    Xtrain = rand(rng, n, 1)
    ytrain = target_fun(Xtrain) .+ std_noise * randn(rng, n, 1)
    Xtest = collect(0:0.01:1)
    ytest = target_fun(Xtest)
    return Xtrain[:, 1], ytrain[:, 1], Xtest, ytest
end

function fit_nadaraya(Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, h)
    ftest = zeros(length(Xtest))
    for itest in 1:length(Xtest)
        x = Xtest[itest]
        temp = exp.(.-(x .- Xtrain).^2 ./ (2.0 * h * h))
        ftest[itest] = dot(temp, ytrain) / sum(temp)
    end
    return ftest
end
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(1)

fig = Figure(size=(1500, 500), fontsize=18)
hs = [0.005, 0.05, 0.25]

for (i, h) in enumerate(hs)
    Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, ytest = generate_data(rng)
    ftest = fit_nadaraya(Xtrain, ytrain, Xtest, h)

    ax = Axis(fig[1, i], limits=((0, 1), (-0.2, 0.7)),
              xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="h = $h")

    lines!(ax, Xtest, ytest, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="target")
    lines!(ax, Xtest, ftest, color=red, linewidth=2, label="Nadaraya-W.")
    scatter!(ax, Xtrain, ytrain, color=:black, marker=:x, markersize=10)

    axislegend(ax, position=:lt)
end

fig
```
